prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HOOKSNPICKS-6PC-BUN-FBA Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Hook and Pick Precision Gold Prospecting Crevice Tool Set 6 Pieces Description: The ASR Outdoor 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for gold panning, prospecting, and rockhounding.

Each hook and pick features an ergonomic grip handle that is made of non-slip rubber that will help prevent slippage during use, assuring precision control and keeping your hands safe.

These hooks and picks are made of 40 HRC high carbon steel that won't rust so you can count on them for years to come. The sturdy design will ensure that they will maintain their sharpness even after many uses.

Each hook and pick measures 9.25" in length, making them a great size for hard-to-reach spots. Although these are intended for gold prospecting and rockhounding, they are also great tools for other precision work like jewelry making, automotive repair, and hobby craft use. Search Terms: gold panning equipment recovery tools accessories essentials gold prospecting crevice picks fine rockhounding tools bedrock supplies camping essentials tools gear outdoors jewelry making Features: - VERSATILE HOOK AND PICK SET - The ASR Outdoor 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for gold panning, prospecting, and rockhounding. - ERGONOMIC HANDLES - Each hook and pick features an ergonomic grip handle that is made of non-slip rubber that will help prevent slippage during use, assuring precision control and keeping your hands safe. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - These hooks and picks are made of 40 HRC high carbon steel that won't rust so you can count on them for years to come. The sturdy design will ensure that they will maintain their sharpness even after many uses. - EXTENDED LENGTH FOR EASE OF USE - Each hook and pick measures 9.25" in length, making them a great size for hard-to-reach spots. Although these are intended for gold prospecting and rockhounding, they are also great tools for other precision work like jewelry making, automotive repair, and hobby craft use. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: 40 HRC high carbon steel; Colors; red and black: Pack size: 6; Tools included: straight, hook, complex, 9 degree, combination and double angle; Length: 9.25"; Handle type: soft-grip ergonomic === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
